Metadata.title: Odoo Agent - AI Agent Platform for Odoo
Metadata.description: Query and manage your Odoo data with artificial intelligence. Inventory, invoicing, sales and more.

NewChat.heading: How can I help you?
NewChat.subheading: Query inventory, invoicing, sales, HR and more directly from your Odoo.
NewChat.connectedMessage: Securely connected to your Odoo instance
NewChat.notConnected: Odoo not configured. Go to Settings to connect.

ChatInput.disclaimer: The agent queries your Odoo instance in real time. Your data is private and secure.

ChatMessages.configNotSet: Odoo connection not configured. Go to Settings to set up your connection.

fileCard.fileExpired: File no longer available. Generate the report again.

Pricing.heading: Plans & Pricing
Pricing.subheading: Choose the plan that best fits your business. Scale when you need to.
Pricing.footer: All plans include data encryption and secure connection to your Odoo.

free.name: Free
free.description: Explore the AI agent's capabilities with Odoo.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For professionals who need full access to their Odoo.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For companies with multiple instances and advanced needs.

Settings.heading: Odoo Settings
Settings.subheading: Connect your Odoo instance so the agent can access your data.

security.title: Security
security.description: Your API Key is stored securely and encrypted. It is only used to perform authorized queries to your Odoo instance. We never share your credentials with third parties.

form.statusError: Could not connect. Check your credentials and try again.

PinnedInsights.title: Pinned Insights
PinnedInsights.emptyHint: Pin charts and files from your conversations to keep them handy.
PinnedInsights.errorPin: Could not pin this item. Please try again.
PinnedInsights.errorUnpin: Could not unpin this item. Please try again.
PinnedInsights.errorClear: Could not clear pins. Please try again.

Notifications.title: Alerts
Notifications.emptyHint: Proactive insights will appear here when anomalies are detected.
Notifications.salesAlertsDesc: Notify when sales drop more than 30%
Notifications.stockAlertsDesc: Notify when product stock falls below minimum
Notifications.invoiceAlertsDesc: Notify about overdue or unusual invoices
Notifications.dailySummaryDesc: Receive a daily summary at 9:00 AM
